sender.what_they_sell: SaaS recruitment firm placing senior sales hires (VP Sales, CROs, Heads of Sales) into B2B SaaS companies. Matthew runs the sales and advisory side; his business partner Natasha handles recruitment delivery. They also advise SaaS companies on building out their sales functions. They focus on profitability and revenue per head rather than volume, and work with fewer clients at higher ACVs.
problems: Post-funding SaaS companies need to hire a senior sales leader fast, and most get it wrong first time, burning 6-12 months of runway
Founders who have never built a sales team don't know what a great VP Sales or CRO looks like, so founder-led sales lingers past its ceiling and revenue targets slip
Even when they know they need someone, the best senior sales candidates are passive and hard to reach through job boards or LinkedIn
